articles.title: Cardano Founder Charles Hoskinson Comments on XRP Lawsuit, Calls It ‘Regulation Through Enforcement’
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) founder Charles Hoskinson doesn’t think highly of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission’s (SEC) lawsuit against Ripple. The SEC sued Ripple in late 2020, alleging the payments firm sold XRP as an unregistered security.
